theory.canonical_statement: A quantum neural cartography mapping CCC assigns to a sequence of DAANSphere addresses (a1,a2,\ldots,ak)(a\_1, a\_2, \ldots, a\_k)(a1,a2,\ldots,ak) a trajectory through neural or metamaterial networks. Each address corresponds to a measurement of a quantum tag's state mapped via entanglement to a reference particle, resulting in a path signature through the 153,600-dimensional state space.
theory.technical_interpretation: A quantum neural cartography mapping CCC assigns to a sequence of DAANSphere addresses (a1,a2,\ldots,ak)(a\_1, a\_2, \ldots, a\_k)(a1,a2,\ldots,ak) a trajectory through neural or metamaterial networks. Each address corresponds to a measurement of a quantum tag's state mapped via entanglement to a reference particle, resulting in a path signature through the 153,600-dimensional state space.

equation_progression.interpretive_role: This names the entry as an actual map between carrier domains rather than a loose metaphor.
This inserts the map into the ordered TRAWIN chain and makes composition explicit.
This closes the entry by requiring that the output land in the admissible target class.
